# REPLENISH_STRATEGY

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various REPLENISH_STRATEGYs generated by REPLENISH_STRATEGY components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| EmployeeID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | EMPLOYEE | Person responsible for strategy. |
| FromDepartment | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | DEPARTMENT | Source Department. Linked to DEPARTMENT table |
| FromFacility | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | FACILITY | Source Facility. Linked to FACILITY table. |
| FromLocationID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE_LOCATION | Source Warehouse location id, linked to WAREHOUSE_LOCATION table. |
| FromPartnerID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PARTNER | Source Partner Identifier, linked to PARTNER table. |
| FromWarehouse | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE | Source Warehouse location id, linked to WAREHOUSE table. |
| FromWorkcenter | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | WORK_CENTER | Source Work Center. Linked to WORK_CENTER table |
| FromZone | NVARCHAR(20) | True |  | False | ZONE | Source zone, linked to ZONE table. |
| ID | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Strategy identifier. Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| LeadTimeInSeconds | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Lead time to replenish kanban define in seconds. Can be use perfomnace dashoboard with reference to KPI to calculate lead-time based on defined formula. |
| Name | NVARCHAR(40) | False |  | False |  | Strategy Name. Unique Value. |
| OrderType | SMALLINT(5,0) | True |  | False | WIP_ORDER_TYPE | Order type created to replenish. |
| PriorityID | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | PRIORITY | Priority set when Source, Destination an Product are equal. |
| SourceType | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_SRC_TYPE | Available values: Vendor, Production, Internal source, External source. |
| Status | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_STATUS | Available values: draft, final, approved. |
| StrategyType | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TYPE | Available values: e-Kanban, physical Kanban, replenishment order. |
| TextID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Unique identifier of the Text. Can be used for translation purposes. |
| ToDepartment | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | DEPARTMENT | Destination Department. Linked to DEPARTMENT table. |
| ToFacility | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | FACILITY | Destination Facility. Linked to FACILITY table. |
| ToLocationID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE_LOCATION | Destination Location ID. Linked to WAREHOUSE_LOCATION table |
| ToPartnerID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PARTNER | To Partner ID. Linked to PARTNER table |
| ToWarehouse | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE | Destination warehouse. Linked to WAREHOUSE table. |
| ToWorkCenter | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | WORK_CENTER | Destination Work Center. Linked to WORK_CENTER table. |
| ToZone | NVARCHAR(20) | True |  | False | ZONE | Destination Zone. Linked to ZONE table. |
| TriggerType | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TRG_TYPE | Available values: Min-Qty, Order status, Operator decision, Plan based. |
| UnitID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | UNIT | Unique identifier of the Unit. |
| ValidFrom | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Strategy validity date. |
| ValidTo | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Strategy validity date. |

## Primary Key

- **PK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY** on `ID`

- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_ToPartnerID** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY -> PARTNER (`ToPartnerID -> ID`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_ToWarehouse** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY -> WAREHOUSE (`ToFacility, ToWarehouse -> Facility, Warehouse`)

- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_ToZone** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY -> ZONE (`ToZone -> Zone`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TriggerType** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY -> REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TRG_TYPE (`TriggerType -> ReplenishStrategyTrgType`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_UnitID** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY -> UNIT (`UnitID -> ID`)
